app.name: Swiss Tenant Assistant
app.tagline: Digital support for tenants in Switzerland

sidebar.summary: Review tenancy documents, generate letters, and keep every case in one place.
sidebar.focusBody: The core flow for upload, analysis, payment, and report delivery is being assembled step by step.

common.genericError: The request could not be completed.

layout.title: A protected entry point for cases, documents, and reports.
layout.description: These auth pages use the backend flows already built for registration, login, and password reset.

points.privateBody: Document and report access is only available after sign-in.
points.secureBody: Persistent session cookies and server-side role checks.
points.fastBody: Clear forms for registration, login, and password reset.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Access your checks, documents, and letters.

register.title: Create a new account
register.description: Set up access for document uploads, checks, and reports.

consents.terms: I accept the terms of service.

forgot.title: Request a reset link
forgot.description: We generate a reset token for your account if the email exists.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.description: Use the reset token and choose a new password.

hero.title: A control surface for checks, documents, and reports.
hero.description: This dashboard is still fed by placeholder data, but the structure is now ready for real cases, uploads, and payment-gated report flows.

stats.documentsDetail: Uploads will appear here once storage flows are connected.
stats.pendingActionsDetail: Next user tasks will be surfaced here.
stats.reportsDetail: Generated PDFs will be listed once the report flow is wired.

workflow.title: The main product path is already defined.
workflow.description: Each module will plug into the same predictable tenant flow from upload to downloadable output.

cases.title: Recent cases
cases.emptyTitle: No tenant cases have been created yet.
cases.emptyDescription: Once upload and check creation are connected, this area will list active Nebenkosten reviews, contract checks, and generated letters.

nebenkosten.title: Service Charge Check
nebenkosten.description: Start the yearly statement review flow with upload, extraction, and rule-based analysis.

contract.title: Lease Contract Check
contract.description: Review deposit, notice periods, and service charge clauses before signing.

letter.title: Letter Generator
letter.description: Prepare objections, requests, and structured tenant communication drafts.

activity.title: Recent implementation progress
activity.authReadyBody: Registration, login, logout, protected routes, and role checks have already been verified end-to-end.
activity.resetReadyBody: Forgot-password and reset-password endpoints are connected to the UI and backed by persisted reset tokens.
activity.nextUiTitle: Case and document modules are next
activity.nextUiBody: The dashboard frame is ready for live case lists, upload widgets, and module-specific entry points.
